chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett.No.D-190 of 2026 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No. 622/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No. 623/2026 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 03.02.2026 Mr. Gul Feroze Kalwar, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2to4. Heard counsel for the petitioner. Record perused. From the perusal of the record, it transpires that the Court of the Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of the Peace, Gambat, vide order dated 03.01.2026, passed in Crl. Misc. Application No.6116/2025, directed the official respondents not to harass the applicant/petitioner in any manner as well as provide legal protection to him strictly in accordance with law (available at page No.13). Since the said order dated 03.01.2026 is still in the field, the instant constitutional petition does not lie and is not maintainable. Accordingly, the present constitutional petition is premature and not maintainable; therefore, it stands dismissed in limine along with all pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
